_about: ILLUSTRATIVE comparable-company set for NVIDIA, approximate ~June 2023 figures ($millions, per-share in $). Numbers are rounded for teaching the METHOD; refresh with live data before relying on output. Peers use TRAILING metrics -- a key caveat: for a hyper-growth name, trailing comps look punishing because they ignore the growth the DCF captures. Read comps as one lens, not the answer.
_units: money = $millions; eps & price = $ per share; growth = decimal long-run
